title: 建立博客完善验收基线
description: 把现有 plan 和 ROADMAP 收敛成一份可勾选的验收边界清单。该任务只定义范围、完成口径和证据位置，不直接推进实现。
acceptance_criteria: 仓库内存在一份验收清单文档，至少覆盖访问可用、真实数据、评论、部署回滚、自动化测试 5 类；每条都有完成定义、证据位置和阻塞记录入口。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认验收项能逐一映射到现有 plan/roadmap，且没有与后续 issue 重复或互相冲突的边界。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时逐项对照 issues CSV 与清单，确认不存在未登记的新范围，且所有证据链接都可打开。
notes: picked_reason:P0 baseline issue that fixes the shared acceptance boundary before feature work; done_at:2026-03-21T12:26:00+08:00; evidence:added repository acceptance baseline with five checklist categories and completion gate; validation_limited:no automated AUTOE2E runner is applicable for this documentation-only issue; manual_test:review docs/project-acceptance-baseline.md against ROADMAP.md and the current issues CSV checklist fields; risk:low documentation-only change

title: 梳理生产配置与密钥来源
description: 盘点域名、证书、反向代理、K3s、GitHub Secrets 与站点环境变量的真实来源。输出一份配置源映射，区分代码项与环境项。
acceptance_criteria: 形成一份配置矩阵，覆盖 DNS、证书、代理、Ingress、SITE_URL、API_BASE_URL、Secrets；每项标明来源、当前值入口、修改责任人与生效路径。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认没有遗漏运行时配置、密钥来源或域名入口，且代码内环境变量命名与实际部署值一致。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时按配置矩阵抽查至少一轮真实环境读取，确认文档与仓库配置、集群配置没有偏差。
notes: picked_reason:P0 config inventory unblocks domain, proxy, ingress, and CI follow-up issues; done_at:2026-03-21T12:30:00+08:00; evidence:added repository-grounded production configuration matrix covering DNS, TLS, proxy, ingress, env vars, and CI secrets entry points; validation_limited:no live DNS, proxy host, or GitHub Actions environment was available for end-to-end verification in this workspace; manual_test:check docs/production-config-matrix.md against the live DNS console, proxy host config, kubectl ingress output, and GitHub Actions secrets configuration; risk:medium external systems may differ from repository defaults until live environment is checked

title: 验证公网访问链路断点
description: 从域名到主节点、再到 Ingress 和前后端服务逐段验证访问链路。该任务的目标是定位断点并保留可复现的检查命令。
acceptance_criteria: 输出一套链路检查脚本或命令清单，至少覆盖 b022mc.cn、www.b022mc.cn、/、/api 与集群入口；能明确指出当前失败发生在哪一段。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认检查顺序覆盖公网、代理、集群、服务四层，且命令结果可复现、无依赖个人环境的隐式假设。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时重新执行同一套链路检查，要求所有断点都能得到成功或明确的新失败原因，不允许出现无法归因的错误。
notes: picked_reason:P0 chain diagnostics can be implemented locally and reused for later ingress or proxy failures; done_at:2026-03-21T12:35:00+08:00; evidence:bash -n passed for scripts/check-public-chain.sh and a live SKIP_K8S=1 run resolved both domains, showed TLS failure on b022mc.cn, and returned HTTP 500 on www.b022mc.cn/api/v1/articles; validation_limited:node-port and kubectl checks were not run because NODE_HOST was unset and cluster access was unavailable in this workspace; manual_test:NODE_HOST=<public-node-ip> bash scripts/check-public-chain.sh and compare ingress, node-port, and public results to isolate the failing hop; risk:medium the script is validated, but cluster-internal hop diagnosis still depends on live node and kubectl access

title: 修复主节点反向代理上游
description: 验证并固化腾讯云主节点的反向代理上游映射，确认 public host 上的 `/` 与 `/api*` 分别落到真实可达的 30180/30800 上游；根域名证书和后端 500 留给其他 issue 处理。
acceptance_criteria: 仓库内存在可复用的主机代理配置说明或样例；主机本地验证证明 127.0.0.1:30180 能返回前端页面、127.0.0.1:30800/api/v1/articles 能命中 blog-api；若后续失败仍存在，必须明确归因到 TLS 或后端应用层而非代理上游。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认记录的是主机代理上游映射与验证证据，而不是把 TLS 或应用 500 混进代理问题；文档里要写清上游端口来源和检查命令。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时在主机上复跑本地 curl，确认 frontend 与 blog-api 上游都能直达；若公网仍失败，需能把问题明确定位到证书、DNS 或应用层。
notes: picked_reason:ssh-manager access to the K3s master now allows direct proxy and upstream verification on the blocked host; scope_refined:host checks show the reverse-proxy upstreams are reachable, while remaining failures are split into BLOG-040 TLS and backend application/schema work; done_at:2026-03-21T13:25:00+08:00; evidence:ssh-manager validation on k3s_master confirmed /opt/caddy/Caddyfile routes /api* to 127.0.0.1:30800 and other paths to 127.0.0.1:30180; host-local curl reached frontend 200 and blog-api 500 from the expected upstream; manual_test:on 119.27.191.212 rerun the documented curl and ss commands in docs/host-reverse-proxy-status.md to confirm the proxy still reaches the same upstream ports; risk:low reverse-proxy upstream mapping is verified; remaining failures now belong to BLOG-040 TLS and backend schema/application work

title: 收口根域名与 HTTPS 策略
description: 统一根域名和 www 域名的 DNS、证书、续期与跳转策略。该任务要明确唯一主域名及其 canonical 行为。
acceptance_criteria: b022mc.cn 与 www.b022mc.cn 均可稳定通过 HTTPS 访问；主域名与 301 跳转规则被明确记录；证书续期方式和告警入口可查。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 DNS 指向、TTL、证书绑定和前端 metadataBase 一致，不出现双主域名或混合协议。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时验证两域名的 HTTP/HTTPS、重定向链和证书有效期，确认不会出现循环跳转或错误证书。

title: 加固 K3s Ingress 与服务入口
description: 检查 Ingress、Service、探针和镜像拉取配置，确保前端 / 与后端 /api 的路由在集群内外都稳定。该任务不改业务协议，只修正入口稳定性。
acceptance_criteria: 集群内外访问 / 与 /api 均能命中正确服务；Ingress/Service 配置与部署镜像版本一致；探针失败时能从 kubectl 输出中快速定位。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认路由规则、端口映射、探针与镜像标签没有脱节，也没有把临时调试配置写死到清单中。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时执行一次部署后的 Ingress 与 Service 验证，确认滚动更新期间入口不中断且探针日志可读。

title: 落地 frontend 与 blog-api 健康检查
description: 为前端和 blog-api 设计可脚本化的健康检查或 smoke URL，并接入部署后的验收链路。任务边界是健康检查定义与接线，不扩展监控平台建设。
acceptance_criteria: 至少存在两个可自动执行的健康检查入口，覆盖 frontend 与 blog-api；部署脚本会在 rollout 后执行检查，并在失败时输出明确诊断。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认健康检查不依赖脆弱页面状态，返回码和失败日志对排障有价值，且不会把真实故障误判为通过。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时在成功与失败两种场景下各跑一轮，确认健康检查既能通过健康版本，也能对故障版本给出明确失败信号。
notes: picked_reason:P0 health endpoints and smoke checks are locally implementable and unblock deployment verification; done_at:2026-03-21T12:40:00+08:00; evidence:added frontend and blog-api health endpoints, switched readiness probes to HTTP health checks, and wired deploy-time smoke_check calls in GitHub Actions; validation_limited:local build and go test passed, but the deploy workflow smoke checks were not executed on the remote K3s host in this workspace; manual_test:run the deploy workflow or SSH onto the K3s node and verify curl http://127.0.0.1:30180/healthz plus curl http://127.0.0.1:30800/api/healthz after rollout; risk:medium runtime smoke checks still need one live deployment pass to confirm host-local node-port reachability

title: 统一前端 API 错误模型
description: 重构前端 API 层的错误对象、状态码解析、超时与鉴权失败处理。边界是请求层与调用约定，不直接改具体页面布局。
acceptance_criteria: API 层对 4xx、5xx、网络错误和超时给出可区分的错误类型；调用方能读取统一错误结构；401/403 分支具备明确处理路径。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认错误对象字段稳定、不会吞掉原始状态码与 message，且浏览器端与服务端请求路径保持一致。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时针对成功、4xx、5xx、超时、离线场景分别验证，确认页面能根据统一错误模型展示正确反馈。
notes: picked_reason:shared frontend API error handling unblocks mock removal, page error states, and auth feedback work; done_at:2026-03-21T12:46:00+08:00; evidence:frontend API layer now throws typed ApiError instances for http, auth, timeout, and network failures with parsed error payload details; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but the repository does not yet contain automated frontend tests that simulate 4xx, 5xx, timeout, and offline branches; manual_test:exercise login with wrong credentials, hit an unavailable backend, and force a slow response to confirm auth, network, and timeout errors are distinguishable in the caller; risk:medium callers still need follow-up UI work to surface the new typed errors everywhere

title: 移除默认 mock 数据回退
description: 把文章列表、详情、搜索和标签的数据层默认行为改成真实 API 调用失败即抛出错误，仅允许通过显式 mock 开关启用样例数据。页面级错误态与重试由 BLOG-090 负责承接。
acceptance_criteria: 默认配置下 fetchArticles、fetchArticle、searchArticles、fetchTags 不再静默使用 mockArticles；只有显式 mock 开关开启时才允许回退样例数据；调用方能收到真实错误对象而不是伪成功结果。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 mock 开关默认关闭、命名清晰，且数据层不会继续把接口失败伪装成空数据或样例数据。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时验证默认配置和 mock 开关开启两条路径：默认配置必须暴露真实错误，显式 mock 模式才允许返回样例数据。
notes: scope_refined:issue limited to data-layer mock fallback removal so page-level error rendering stays in BLOG-090; picked_reason:API layer cleanup is required before page error-state work can be accurate; done_at:2026-03-21T12:50:00+08:00; evidence:data-layer article and tag fetch helpers now rethrow real API errors by default and only use mockArticles when ENABLE_API_MOCKS or NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_API_MOCKS is explicitly enabled; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but this workspace did not execute both runtime branches with and without the mock toggle enabled; manual_test:run with default env and confirm backend failures surface as errors, then rerun with NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_API_MOCKS=1 and confirm the same helpers return mock data intentionally; risk:medium callers now receive real errors, so page-level handling must be completed in BLOG-090 to avoid empty-state masking or unhandled promise noise

title: 统一核心页面数据态
description: 为首页、标签页、详情页、归档页、后台页以及文章详情 metadata 生成链路统一补齐 loading、empty、error、retry 四种状态，避免真实 API 失败后继续落到空态或未处理异常。
acceptance_criteria: 首页、标签页、详情页、归档页和后台页都存在明确的加载中、空态、错误态和重试入口；文章详情 metadata 生成失败时不会抛出未处理异常；失败后可重新触发请求。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认各页面的错误态不会覆盖空态语义，retry 会真正重新发起请求，metadata 失败时有安全降级。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时逐页模拟成功、空结果和接口失败，确认状态切换正确；同时验证文章详情 metadata 在 API 失败时仍可返回稳定页面标题。
notes: scope_refined:archive page and detail metadata share the same data-path failure mode and are included in this issue boundary; picked_reason:page-level error states are now required because BLOG-080 stopped masking backend failures with default mock data; done_at:2026-03-21T13:02:00+08:00; evidence:home, tags, detail, archive, and admin pages now track loading plus error state separately, expose retry actions, and detail metadata generation degrades safely when article fetch fails; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but the workspace did not exercise each page against live failing API responses or empty-result scenarios; manual_test:stop the backend or force 500 responses, then verify each page shows a retryable error card instead of empty data; also open a blog slug with a failing API and confirm metadata falls back to a stable title; risk:medium comment-area and delete-action feedback still rely on follow-up issues even though page-level load failures are now explicit

title: 收敛评论组件为单一实现
description: 移除遗留评论组件或将其完全替换为当前在线实现，确保仓库只保留一套评论入口。该任务聚焦代码边界清晰，不扩展评论功能。
acceptance_criteria: 仓库中只剩一套可复用的评论组件实现；真实页面引用路径唯一；遗留组件中的占位逻辑与 console 输出全部清除。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认调用方都切到同一实现，且删除旧组件不会引入循环依赖或样式退化。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时检查文章详情页评论渲染、回复入口和未登录态，确认功能与样式未因组件合并而回退。
notes: picked_reason:removing the unused legacy comment component reduces the chance of editing the wrong implementation before BLOG-110; done_at:2026-03-21T13:07:00+08:00; evidence:removed the unused legacy comment component and verified the active article detail page still imports the single blog comment implementation; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but no dedicated automated interaction test covers the article comment tree yet; manual_test:open a blog detail page and confirm the comment area still renders, accepts reply targeting, and no import errors reference the deleted legacy path; risk:low the deleted component had no remaining imports in frontend/src and the active component path remains unchanged

title: 补齐评论失败与重试反馈
description: 为评论加载失败、提交失败、未登录和重复提交等场景提供用户可见反馈。该任务要求评论链路在真实后端下可观察、可重试。
acceptance_criteria: 评论加载失败时有错误提示与重试入口；提交失败时有明确原因或统一错误提示；未登录与重复提交状态不会静默失败。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认评论状态不会与页面主数据态混淆，提交中按钮禁用、重试逻辑和错误清理时机都清晰。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时覆盖评论列表失败、提交失败、401 未登录、重复点击提交与回复取消，确认每种场景都可复现且反馈稳定。
notes: picked_reason:the active comment component already exists, so adding visible load and submit feedback is a focused follow-up with immediate user impact; done_at:2026-03-21T13:11:00+08:00; evidence:active comment component now shows visible load failures with retry, surfaces submit errors including auth expiration, and clears stale error text during retry or reply changes; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but this workspace did not exercise comment API failures against a live backend or expired token; manual_test:on a blog detail page, simulate comment list failure, submit failure, and expired auth to confirm the error card or inline submit message appears and retry reloads comments; risk:medium full end-to-end validation still depends on a live comment backend and an auth session

title: 加强后台鉴权与操作反馈
description: 完善后台页面对 token 失效、未授权、删除失败和请求中状态的处理。任务边界是管理页使用体验，不修改后台接口语义。
acceptance_criteria: 后台在未登录、token 失效和删除失败时都能给出明确反馈；进行中的删除或加载请求有禁用态；未授权用户不会停留在错误页面。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 useAuth、管理页和 API 层的鉴权处理一致，且不会因为 localStorage 状态不同步造成假登录。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时验证首次加载、token 过期、删除成功/失败、未登录跳转四类场景，确认后台流程闭环。
notes: picked_reason:P1 admin auth and delete feedback build directly on the existing typed API errors and can be closed locally without deployment access; done_at:2026-03-21T14:00:00+08:00; evidence:admin routes now wait for auth hydration, redirect expired sessions to /auth with next parameters, and show inline delete failures while disabling management controls during active requests; validation_limited:npm run lint and npm run build passed, but no automated AUTOE2E browser flow exercised expired-token redirects or delete-failure branches against a live backend; manual_test:set an expired token in localStorage, open /admin and /admin/edit, confirm redirect to /auth with the preserved next target, then force a delete failure and verify the inline error banner plus disabled controls; risk:medium final token-expiry behavior still depends on the deployed auth backend returning 401 or 403 consistently

title: 强化文章编辑器可靠性
description: 为新建/编辑文章补齐校验、标签规范、预览一致性、离开提醒和保存失败恢复。该任务聚焦内容生产可靠性，不扩展富文本能力。
acceptance_criteria: 标题与内容必填校验明确可见；标签重复与空值被拦截；预览与保存内容一致；保存失败后表单内容仍保留；离开未保存页面时有提醒。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认编辑页状态不会因预览切换或加载旧文而丢失，保存失败不清空输入，校验规则可复用。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时覆盖新建、编辑、预览切换、保存失败、未保存离开与标签编辑，确认输入状态和最终请求体都正确。

title: 补齐 SEO 与站点资产
description: 补完首页、文章详情、标签页的动态 metadata，以及 canonical、Open Graph、sitemap 与 robots 等站点资产。边界是搜索与分享元数据，不改内容本身。
acceptance_criteria: 首页、详情页、标签页都输出正确 title/description/canonical；站点提供 sitemap 与 robots；feed、metadataBase 与实际域名策略一致。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 SEO 字段来源稳定、避免重复 canonical 或硬编码错误域名，且动态页面不会复用错误 metadata。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时检查页面源码与生成资产，确认搜索引擎与社交分享抓取到的 URL、标题、描述均符合预期。

title: 优化阅读体验与前端性能
description: 优化文章页的移动端目录、代码块、封面与首屏滚动体验。该任务只针对阅读场景的稳定性与性能，不重新设计整体视觉风格。
acceptance_criteria: 文章详情页在移动端可正常阅读、目录不遮挡正文、代码块可滚动且样式稳定；首屏渲染与滚动时无明显卡顿。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认性能优化没有牺牲可读性或可访问性，目录、动画和 markdown 渲染不会互相抢占布局。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时在桌面和移动视口下检查首屏、长文滚动、目录跳转和代码块展示，确认体验一致且无明显回退。

title: 建立前端自动化测试基线
description: 引入前端 test 脚本并覆盖 API 封装、鉴权 hook、关键页面状态和评论交互。边界是最小可行保护网，不追求一次性全覆盖。
acceptance_criteria: frontend/package.json 中存在可执行 test 脚本；至少覆盖 API 错误处理、useAuth、页面数据态与评论交互 4 类用例；本地与 CI 均可运行。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认测试选择覆盖高风险路径而非纯快照，mock 与真实依赖边界清晰，失败信息可读。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时执行完整前端测试集与一次失败注入，确认新增测试能拦住 API 错误态和评论交互回归。

title: 建立后端服务测试基线
description: 为 article、comment 与 blog-api 核心路径补齐单元和集成测试。任务目标是覆盖 CRUD、鉴权和评论主链路，不在本轮引入复杂测试平台。
acceptance_criteria: go test 可覆盖文章 CRUD、评论读取/创建、blog-api 关键 HTTP 路由与错误码映射；测试可在 CI 中稳定运行。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认测试覆盖的是核心行为和错误边界，而不是仅验证实现细节；外部依赖替身与真实接口边界明确。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时执行完整后端测试集，并至少验证一次错误码映射、评论树返回和文章 CRUD 回归。

title: 升级 CI/CD 与回滚链路
description: 把前后端测试、构建缓存、部署后 smoke 检查、失败日志归档和回滚步骤固化到 GitHub Actions。该任务关注交付可靠性与故障恢复。
acceptance_criteria: CI 在 main 分支部署前会执行前后端质量检查；部署后自动跑 smoke；失败日志可直接查看；存在明确的上一版镜像或配置回滚步骤。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 workflow 的依赖顺序、超时、日志输出与 secrets 使用合理，失败路径不会吞掉关键诊断信息。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时至少演练一次部署成功和一次模拟失败，确认 smoke、日志归档与回滚文档都能按预期工作。

title: 沉淀运维与发布 Runbook
description: 把部署、证书续期、常见故障排查、依赖升级和内容发布流程沉淀为长期维护文档。该任务是收尾治理，不额外引入新系统。
acceptance_criteria: 仓库内存在一份可执行的 Runbook，覆盖部署、域名/证书、回滚、故障排查、升级频率和发布流程；新同事可按文档完成一次演练。
review_initial_requirements: Review 时确认 Runbook 使用仓库内真实路径与命令，不依赖口口相传的隐式知识，并包含风险提示和责任边界。
review_regression_requirements: 回归时按文档抽样演练部署、证书检查或回滚流程，确认文档步骤完整且不会遗漏关键前置条件。
